mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transaction_category(user_id, name, type, code, is_default) VALUES(#{userId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{code}, #{isDefault})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, name, type, code, is_default AS isDefault FROM transaction_category WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY type, id
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM transaction_category WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, name, type, code, is_default AS isDefault FROM transaction_category WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transaction_category WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1
